channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: How to watch the 49ers vs. Texans on Sunday
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers take on the Houston Texans at 10 a.m. PT on Sunday, Oct. 26 at NRG Stadium in Houston.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Blue Jays rookie Trey Yesavage holds down Dodgers for 4 innings in historic World Series start
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Standout rookie starter Trey Yesavage didn't have his best stuff but limited the Los Angeles Dodgers to two runs over four innings for the Toronto Blue Jays in Game 1 of the World Series on Friday night. Toronto rallied for an 11-4 win.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic scores 49 to extend his sizzling season start in Lakers' 128-110 win over Timberwolves
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 49 points and became the fourth player in NBA history to begin a season with back-to-back 40-point performances, leading the Los Angeles Lakers to a 128-110 victory over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani follows historic 2-way show with World Series homer, but Dodgers routed by Jays
item.description: Shohei Ohtani followed his two-way show for the ages with a homer in the Dodgers’ World Series opener, but he also grounded out with the bases loaded in Los Angeles’ 11-4 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays.
item.dc:creator: Rob Gillies, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Barger, Varsho and Kirk lead homer barrage as Blue Jays rout Dodgers 11-4 in World Series opener
item.description: Addison Barger launched the first pinch-hit grand slam in World Series history, Alejandro Kirk added a two-run homer in a nine-run sixth inning and the Toronto Blue Jays overwhelmed the defending champion Los Angeles Dodgers 11-4 in Game 1.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Blue Jays' Addison Barger hits first pinch-hit grand slam in World Series history
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Blue Jays outfielder Addison Barger launched the first pinch-hit grand slam in World Series history during Game 1 against the Los Angeles Dodgers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaronson scores early as Leeds beat struggling West Ham 2-1 in Premier League
item.description: LEEDS, England (AP) — Nuno Espirito Santo became the first West Ham coach since 2018 to go winless in his first four games as his struggling team showed the same defensive frailties that have plagued it all season in a 2-1 loss to Leeds in the Premier League on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chelsea's US private equity owners were once ridiculed. Now opinions are changing
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Against the geopolitical backdrop of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in early 2022, a consortium led by American private equity titans took the opportunity to acquire one of soccer’s crown jewels. What followed at Chelsea was torrid and, at times, bewildering.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Americans win fourth straight fourball match at the LPGA's International Crown team event
item.description: GOYANG, South Korea (AP) — The United States stayed perfect at the LPGA's International Crown tournament on Friday, winning its third and fourth fourball matches and ending No. 1-ranked Jeeno Thitikul's unbeaten record in the team competition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cooley's hat trick leads Mammoth past Blues, 7-4
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley scored a natural hat trick in the first period, and the Utah Mammoth won their fifth straight, 7-4 against the St. Louis Blues at Enterprise Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fever's Sophie Cunningham inspired by fellow WNBA star Angel Reese's historic Victoria's Secret runway debut
item.description: Indiana Fever star Sophie Cunningham says she hopes to walk in the Victoria’s Secret Fashion Show after praising Angel Reese’s history-making runway debut.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA All-Star Jimmy Butler joins San Diego sports world as minority investor
item.description: Jimmy Butler, six-time NBA All-Star, has joined San Diego Wave FC as a Minority Investor and aims to set a new standard for women's sports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: New ‘Padres Park’ to bring inclusive baseball to North County
item.description: The Miracle League of San Diego, San Diego Padres, Padres Foundation, and County of San Diego are partnering to renovate Miracle Field at San Dieguito Park into "Padres Park", a fully inclusive ballfield for athletes of all abilities, funded by a combination of public and private support.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Bear it all?: Wieners Circle to give away free hot dogs if Ben Johnson goes shirtless after a win
item.description: CHICAGO — Last month, an iconic Chicago hot dog stand on the North Side dished out dozens of free hot dogs after Bears quarterback Caleb Williams threw four touchdown passes, and the chance could soon come again for those who missed out on the hot dog extravaganza.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: RSL prepares for hostile environment at Portland
item.description: HERRIMAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake snuck into the MLS Playoffs with a draw this past weekend at St. Louis. Now, they want to make a deep run in the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hopes to avoid another letdown after rivalry win
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a game BYU players and fans won't soon forget, a third straight victory in the Holy War of Utah, 24-21. "It was a big win," said wide receiver Parker Kingston, who had a touchdown run. "It was a fun win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Celebrating 50 seasons of Tampa Bay Buccaneers football
item.description: In addition to a hot start and potential championship aspirations, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers are celebrating 50 seasons in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Crumbl CEO pays fine for BYU fans rushing the field after beating Utah
item.description: The CEO of the Utah-based cookie company, Crumbl, paid the Big 12 fine for BYU fans rushing the field after BYU's victory over the Utah Utes on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ava Hart, ABC 4

item.title: Florida fires coach Billy Napier after four-year run that ends with a 22-23 record
item.description: Florida fired coach Billy Napier on Sunday, dumping him a day after an error-filled win against Mississippi State that included more head-scratching calls and offensive lulls like those that marked much of his four-year run with the Gators.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former NFL All-Pro running back Doug Martin dead at 36
item.description: Martin’s family released a statement saying, “It is with great sadness to inform you all that Doug Martin passed away Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, NewsNation

item.title: Oakland-born, former All-Pro RB Doug Martin dies at 36
item.description: (KRON) -- Former NFL All-Pro running back Doug Martin has died at the age of 36, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers confirmed on social media Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: USF football’s Golesh and Harris named to midseason award lists
item.description: The No. 19-ranked South Florida football program enters the weekend at 5-1 (2-0 American) and saw its early season success recognized with head coach Alex Golesh and graduate linebacker Mac Harris named to midseason award lists.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, WFLA, NBC
